title: Slender
description: This mod adds an intelligent entity, that's created to scare and kill.
body:
## **Slender**
### Slender adds an intelligent entity, that's created to scare and kill.
If you want to be scared you are in wrong place, but entity is intelligent maybe you would be scared i was scared.
There are 5 types of Slenders. There is Normal Slender, Slenderparanoia, SlenderJumpScare, Slenderillusion, SlenderShadow.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Normal Slender** does: Run towards player and try to kill player. It will despawn in some time.
**Slender Paranoia** does: He's invisible he walks towards player if he collides with player he has got 50% to despawn.
**SlenderJumpScare** does: Run towards player. If he is 10 blocks close to player he will despawn,
strike a lighting and spawn Normal Slender.
**Slenderillusion** does: Run towars player. If he is 35 block close to player he will despawn, and have 70% of spawning SlenderShadow and 30% of spawning Normal Slender.
**SlenderShadow** does: Run towards player. If he is 7 blocks close to player he will despawn, and give effect Blindess 3, Slowness 2, Nausea 2 every effect for 15 seconds.


</details>


There is 5 Slenders, but only one can kill you. Others just must to scare you. If you kill Slender he will drop an item called finger. With finger you can craft finger on stick:![How to craft finger on stick:![How to craft finger on stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1cdc4a5da0090fe57a7fb046f4ae06f4bed01b2.png)
Finger on stick works like hoe, its durablity is close to diamond one.
